A '''battle''' was fought at [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] between the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] and the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Battle-stub}}

==Aftermath==
The Republic defeated the Separatists and the conflict was one of the key victories that started the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]].

*<!-- 2005-10-25 -->''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' {{1stm}}
